description: Configure OpenMRS to track telephone extensions for locations by creating a new Location Attribute Type at https://localhost/openmrs/admin (Username: 'superman', Password: 'Admin123'). The attribute type must be named 'Landline Extension' with the description 'Internal telephone extension number', Datatype 'Free Text' (java.lang.String), Min Occurs '0', and Max Occurs '1'. Ensure the attribute type is successfully created and visible in the system.
